chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT HYDERABAD C.P.NO.S-73 OF 2017 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) 1. For orders on office objection. 2. For orders of MA-253/2017 3. For katcha peshi. 22.09.2017 Mr. Fakhruddin Dahraj, Advocate for petitioners. Mr. Shabbir Zardari, Assistant A.G = Despite notice, the respondents have failed to appear before this Court. Learned Assistant A.G submits that parawise comments on behalf of respondents No.2 and 3 have already been filed. Learned Counsel for the petitioners states that he will be satisfied and would not press this petition if directions are issued to the respondents not to cause any harassment to the petitioners. In view of the above, this petition is being disposed of with direction to the private respondents namely Bakram Imamuddin, Mehboob Ali Sabo Talib Hussain Khalid Hussain Aijaz Shahnawaz and Gul Hassan, to restrain themselves from causing any harassment to the petitioners and the official respondents to provide legal protection to the petitioners, in the event the petitioners approach them, but strictly in accordance with law. Concerned SHO is also directed to serve the copy of this order on the above named private respondents by calling them in Police Station and compliance of such service should be furnished with the Additional Registrar of this Court. JUDGE Shahid
